TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_India, title = India, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/India} }

S.FORM: India hya' ga cyux maki' tay 20 00 N, 77 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 3,287,263 sq km (maki' tay 7ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 2,973,193 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 314,070 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 1,266,883,598. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 60.50% , lhlahuy hya' ga 23.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 16.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga New Delhi. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 26 na tay qutux byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Pranab Mukherjee, aring ryax 25 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

India hya' ga cyux maki' tay 20 00 N, 77 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 3,287,263 sq km (maki' tay 7ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 2,973,193 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 314,070 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 1,266,883,598. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 60.50% , lhlahuy hya' ga 23.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 16.40%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga New Delhi. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 26 na tay qutux byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Pranab Mukherjee, aring ryax 25 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: in*ia ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azijaʔ s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ *,***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj *ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa *,***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa new *elħi. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa pranaβ mukħerjee, ariŋ rjax ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
